GateDocument.TextWithNodes: "This cult scent has had a very festive (and very limited) makeover", "Flowerbomb in a sparkly dress. Run, don't walk.", "Since it arrived on the scene in 2005, Viktor&Rolf's Flowerbomb has been regularly featured in best seller scents lists the world over for very good reason. It's unique and beautiful, sophisticated and sexy. Originally conceived by the exuberant, conceptual Dutch fashion designers, Viktor Horsting and Rolf Snoeren, with an ambitious goal: to spread more positivity, if you're not already wearing it, Flowerbomb might just be the joyful salve your 2020 needs. Surround your Holiday season in towers of pink boxes decked out in shimmering stars and embrace the magic of the world's most luxurious scent. An antithesis to the proliferation of unisex scents which had dominated the decade which preceded it, Flowerbomb's decadent brand of femininity, a veritable explosion of flowers, fast won over fans. "Flowerbomb will take you by surprise," Horsting and Snoeren said when Flowerbomb first launched. "When we present our collections, we don't just present clothes, we present a dream and that's what this fragrance is as well." In fact, it was the name Flowerbomb which came first to the creative pair - they knew exactly what they wanted, before it was ever blended and bottled. The beating heart of Flowerbomb - the part responsible for that "explosion" - is crafted with a festival of flowers including Sambac jasmine, freesia, Centifolia rose, Catteleya orchid and Osmanthus. Patchouli and vanilla are what give the scent its sweet sensuality and what causes a trail of compliments to follow in its wake. To celebrate the holidays, and to give you the perfect gift to add to your own Holiday wish list, Viktor&Rolf invite you to an enchanting Holiday ball, to dance the night away and to be sprinkled in a cascading waterfall of shimmering stars. Flowerbomb now comes in a limited-edition, highly collectible bottle. Beautifully faceted like a pink diamond to signify both strength and femininity, the original bottle already makes it perfect for displaying on the dresser. Now, covered in a smattering of shimmering stars and an oversized, very haute-couture star around its neck, Flowerbomb just got even more festive. Apply it to pulse points: the wrist, inner elbow and neck, and the scent will radiate for hours. If gifts for others, and not just yourself, are on your shopping list these Holidays, Viktor&Rolf also have a host of gift sets featuring their signature scents, including Flowerbomb, and Bonbon (a sweet, caramel scent in a cute-as-a-button bow-shape glass vessel). Each set contains a luxurious collection of fragranced treasures, packaged in the most delightful way. The generous Luxury Holiday Gift Set is a two-tier star-shaped box in the prettiest shade of pink, and featuring the fragrance as well as a Scented Shower Gel and Body Lotion. Gift sets are also available in Viktor&Rolf's male scent, Spicebomb so you can gift him the perfect complementary fragrance. Many of the sets also include body products featuring the same Viktor&Rolf signature scent. Use them to layer with your favourite fragrance for longevity that lasts through a festive night out (and then some), or in place of your scent if you're keen to mix up the potency. Each of the gift sets come wrapped in Viktor&Rolf's own grosgrain box and stamped with the seal of the designers themselves. Sophisticated and sweet, just like the Holidays should be. Shop the limited-edition Flowerbomb fragrance collection here."
